channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年4月25日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Sabotaging projects by overthinking, scope creep, and structural diffing #2 Different Language Models Learn Similar Number Representations #3 Spinel: Ruby AOT Native Compiler #4 DeepSeek v4 #5 US special forces soldier arrested after allegedly winning $400k on Maduro raid #6 Mounting tar archives as a filesystem in WebAssembly #7 Show HN: How LLMs Work – Interactive visual guide based on Karpathy's lecture #8 An update on recent Claude Code quality reports #9 8087 Emulation on 8086 Systems #10 Hear your agent suffer through your code
